context_summary: Mission #319 seals the public-clean closeout of Mission Control, mobile Decision Boxes, Preview-first planning, risk-scaled Strikeforce, Goddess Mode, and Shardblade after Mission #317 and PR #318 completed. Missions #315 and #316 are now also complete. Generated lifecycle projection freshness remains unproven and no runtime, protected, Quest-state, or generated-current claim is made.

observations.observation: A complete restart-safe Preview must be stored on the Mission Board before branch or pull-request construction.
observations.rationale: Mission #317 and PR #318 already made this rule canonical; no canonical Golden Wing exists for a reinforcement binding.

observations.observation: Preview Strikeforce and exact-head Build Strikeforce answer different questions and remain risk-scaled.
observations.rationale: The distinction is already canonical in the Mission Control and Strikeforce contracts.

observations.observation: Discovered path expansion returns through Repair Preview before mutation.
observations.rationale: Mission #317 proved the behavior and PR #318 absorbed it into canonical workflow doctrine.

observations.observation: Passing tests does not replace semantic reconciliation against the accepted objective and restart-safe lifecycle.
observations.rationale: The rule is already represented in canonical Strikeforce and Mission Control doctrine.

observations.observation: Goddess Mode may continue bounded recoverable work, while Shardblade remains the unchanged exact-head permanence boundary.
observations.rationale: The authority separation is already canonical and this Sunset creates no new promotion candidate.

observations.observation: Copilot review quota exhaustion and temporary workflow timing should not become durable doctrine.
observations.rationale: They are transient environmental conditions rather than reusable Atlas knowledge.

next_safe_action: Use these records for restart context; refresh generated lifecycle projections only through a separate verified generated-refresh transaction.

protected_data.clean_summary: Public-clean repository, Mission, lifecycle, validation, generated-state, and workflow context only; no protected values or runtime evidence are embedded.

quest_scope.work_scope: Chat-closeout continuity for Mission Control, Decision Boxes, Preview-first planning, Strikeforce, Goddess Mode, and Shardblade boundaries.
